headline: Days after President Trump celebrated ousting incumbent Sen. Bill Cassidy in Louisiana’s GOP primary, Cassidy voted in favor of advancing a resolution that would limit Trump’s ability to wage war in Iran without congressional approval

A Georgia congressman and a former college football coach will meet in a runoff next month after neither captured 50% of the vote in the GOP Senate primary Tuesday to challenge Democrat Jon Ossoff for his Senate seat
UK waters down new Russian oil sanctions as fuel prices rise
Xi calls for end to Middle East hostilities, strengthens Russia trade deals as Putin visits China

Two police officers who defended the Capitol during the Jan. 6, 2021, attack filed a lawsuit seeking to stop the Trump administration’s plan to create a nearly $1.8 billion fund for payouts to purported victims of “weaponization and lawfare”
Hilton and Becerra lead in a tightening race in final weeks of California governor's campaign, poll shows
President Trump’s handpicked House candidate defeated longtime GOP antagonist Rep. Thomas Massie of Kentucky, underscoring the president’s iron grip on the Republican Party
Ex-Cuba leader Raul Castro, 94, charged with murder, conspiracy to kill Americans in 1996 shootdown of humanitarian planes
Mango fashion tycoon embroiled in bitter dispute with son before he plunged from cliff during hike together: reports
EU negotiators reached a provisional deal to remove some tariffs on U.S. imports as part of the bloc’s trade deal signed last summer, ahead of a U.S. deadline to ramp up tariffs on cars
